title: Struct Lifetime
description: Link the lifetime of a struct's reference field to the struct instance itself using lifetime parameters.
problemStatement:
References in Structs! Define a struct `ImportantExcerpt` that has a single field `part` which is a string slice (`&str`).

**Requirement:** Add a lifetime annotation `'a` to both the struct and its field.
hints: When a struct holds a reference, it must specify a lifetime for that reference.
expectedOutput: A struct that can safely hold string slices
